content: Run mandatory testing gate - Oracle harness, unit tests, integration tests
Conduct take stock assessment of current progress
Run comprehensive code audit using zen mcp tools
Identify next sprint objectives to surpass R
Fix critical bootstrap n_stats bug for statistical correctness
Optimize GLM IRLS algorithm - replace QR per iteration with normal equations
Eliminate memory allocation churn in IRLS working data calculations
Integrate R baseline benchmarks for continuous performance validation
Implement formula-based API connecting formula and dmatrix crates
Add memory profiling to track progress toward ≤50% R memory target
